prompt: Add login to my dApp. Users should authenticate with their wallet and the session should persist across page refreshes.
assertions: Uses viem's native SIWE utilities (createSiweMessage, verifySiweMessage) NOT the siwe npm package
Uses iron-session or equivalent for encrypted cookie-based sessions
Implements nonce-first flow: server generates nonce before client signs
API routes exist for nonce generation, signature verification, and session check
Domain validation against Host header in verify route
Nonce is cleared after successful verification (single-use)
Session persists across page refreshes (cookie-based, not just client state)
Creates a custom hook (useSiwe or similar) encapsulating the auth flow
Frontend shows sign-in/sign-out UI with session status
Handles wallet disconnect gracefully (auto-logout or session invalidation)
